revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-280

A component of a fuse that is to be replaced after the fuse has operated.


Note: A small fuse link consisting of a ceramic or glass cylinder with metal caps at each end, connected by fusible wire, is called a.cartridge fuse.

{{IALAFooter}}
